item.title: Unearthing 100-Year-Old Eggs
item.description: A curious look at 100-year-old eggs, exploring their history and what makes them such a fascinating find.

media:content.media:title: Unearthing 100-Year-Old Eggs
media:content.media:description: A curious look at 100-year-old eggs, exploring their history and what makes them such a fascinating find.

item.title: Boneless Chocolate Chip Cookies?
item.description: A curious take on chocolate chip cookies with a soft, comforting bite. We had to try this playful food idea.

media:content.media:title: Boneless Chocolate Chip Cookies?
media:content.media:description: A curious take on chocolate chip cookies with a soft, comforting bite. We had to try this playful food idea.
